subcodes.title: Kitabu’sh-Shahadah
subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit that Most Sacred Being, Who hath ever been sanctified beyond the description of aught else beside Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی العظیم. حمد و ثناء ذات اقدسی را سزاوار است که لم یزل منزه بوده طلعت حضرت او از وصف ماسوای او
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @impossibility of true worship of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
